sources.title: Stripe vs Adyen: Platform Wars Heat Up

result.summary: Stripe dominates in developer-first SMB and startup segments with 3.1M+ businesses, while Adyen holds stronger enterprise positioning with unified commerce capabilities and direct acquiring licenses across 30+ countries.
key_findings: Stripe processes over $1T in annual payment volume, primarily from platform and marketplace customers
Adyen's unified commerce approach gives it an edge in omnichannel retail with 15% YoY merchant growth
Stripe's financial services expansion (Treasury, Issuing, Capital) creates deeper platform lock-in than Adyen's payment-focused strategy
